find.why: You should meet Clarence, as his innovative ideas about creativity could inspire you to explore new possibilities in your own projects.
find.match_belief: Legibility is the first medicine. When someone understands, fear shrinks.

profile.belief: Abstract models become real when you drag a slider and watch a city flood. Then people get it.
profile.working_on: Creating interactive game environments that show how carbon cascades through weather, crops, and infrastructure across a playable timeline.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to bridge complex ideas with tangible experiences, making environmental consequences feel immediate and relatable.
